---
title: "prexorctl token create"
description: "Create a new join token"
---

<!-- auto-generated by tools/gen-cli-docs.ts — do not edit by hand. -->

## Usage

```text
prexorctl token create [flags]
```

## Flags

```text
-h, --help          help for create
        --node string   Node ID for the token
        --ttl string    Token time-to-live (e.g. 1h, 24h) (default "1h")
```

## Global flags

```text
--ascii               Use ASCII glyphs only (no unicode box drawing, sparklines, etc.)
        --context string      Override active context for this invocation
    -c, --controller string   Override controller URL
    -j, --json                Output in JSON format
        --no-color            Disable colored output
    -t, --token string        Override auth token
    -v, --verbose             Show HTTP request/response details
```
